Cit\u00e9/Cin\u00e9ma de la Cit\u00e9.title: Who Framed Roger Rabbit
Cit\u00e9/Cin\u00e9ma de la Cit\u00e9.catchline: Carte blanche for the director of Ernest & Celestine and The Big Bad Fox and Other Tales. Benjamin Renner invites you to rediscover Robert Zemeckis' cult film, Who Framed Roger Rabbit, on the big screen.

Cit\u00e9/Cin\u00e9ma de la Cit\u00e9.title: Azur & Asmar: The Princes' Quest
Cit\u00e9/Cin\u00e9ma de la Cit\u00e9.catchline: Carte blanche is given to Maïlys Vallade, who directed the feature film Little Amélie or the Character of Rain, Annecy 2026 Audience Award. She will be presenting the film classic Azur & Asmar: The Prince's Quest by illustrious Director Michel Ocelot.

Cit\u00e9/Cin\u00e9ma de la Cit\u00e9.title: The Crossing
Cit\u00e9/Cin\u00e9ma de la Cit\u00e9.catchline: As part of her Carte blanche screening, Florence Miailhe will present The Crossing, which received the Jury Distinction for a Feature Film at the 2021 Annecy Festival.

Cit\u00e9/Cin\u00e9ma de la Cit\u00e9.title: Fantastic Mr. Fox
Cit\u00e9/Cin\u00e9ma de la Cit\u00e9.catchline: Carte blanche for Anthony Roux, co-founder of Ankama, the studio behind DOFUS, WAKFU and Princess Dragon! He will be presenting the Annecy 2010 Cristal for a Feature Film, Fantastic Mr. Fox by the legendary Wes Anderson.

Cit\u00e9/Cin\u00e9ma de la Cit\u00e9.title: Ratatouille
Cit\u00e9/Cin\u00e9ma de la Cit\u00e9.catchline: What a perfect choice having Chef Franck Derouet and Head Sommelier Thomas Lorival, Directors of the Michelin-starred restaurant Clos des Sens in Annecy-le-Vieux, to introduce Ratatouille by Brad Bird! They will make the most of this carte blanche to chat with the audience at the end of the screening.

Cit\u00e9/Cin\u00e9ma de la Cit\u00e9.title: A Cat in Paris
Cit\u00e9/Cin\u00e9ma de la Cit\u00e9.catchline: Audrey Tautou, who has voiced characters in films directed by Alain Gagnol and Jean-Loup Felicioli including Nina and the Hedgehog's Secret and Phantom Boy, will be joining us to present her personal favourite during this Carte blanche. On the programme you will rediscover a classic from this director-duo, A Cat in Paris.

Cit\u00e9/Cin\u00e9ma de la Cit\u00e9.title: ANKAMA: from "WAKFU" to "WAVEN" – A New Era Begins
Cit\u00e9/Cin\u00e9ma de la Cit\u00e9.catchline: Get ready for a major reveal: Ankama brings WAKFU Season 5 and unveils WAVEN with the world premiere of its first episode.

Cit\u00e9/Cin\u00e9ma de la Cit\u00e9.title: Children of Liberty
Cit\u00e9/Cin\u00e9ma de la Cit\u00e9.catchline: Join us for the preview screening of Children of Liberty.

Bonlieu/Forum.catchline: Emmanuel Lantam will be signing his book Marly ou la neige en été published by Réalistes editions.

Bonlieu/Forum.catchline: Thomas Von Kummant will be signing copies of the complete Gung Ho collection published by Paquet.

Bonlieu/Forum.title: Renaud Roche – "Lucas Wars"
Bonlieu/Forum.catchline: Renaud Roche will be signing both volumes of his French comic book Les Guerres de Lucas published by Deman.

Bonlieu/Forum.title: Guy Delisle – "L'Occupation des sols"
Bonlieu/Forum.catchline: Guy Delisle will be signing his latest work L'Occupation des sols published by Gallimard.

Bonlieu/Forum.title: Bannister – "The Banncars: Iconic Pop Culture Vehicles and Other Automative Art by Bannister"
Bonlieu/Forum.catchline: Bannister will be signing copies of his book The Banncars: Iconic Pop Culture Vehicles and Other Automative Art by Bannister published by BDfugue.

Bonlieu/Forum.title: Marion Montaigne – "Space Montaigne"
Bonlieu/Forum.catchline: Marion Montaigne will be signing her book Space Montaigne published by Dargaud.

Bonlieu/Forum.title: Zoé Barthélémy – "Mămăligă"
Bonlieu/Forum.catchline: Zoé Barthélémy will be signing her comic book Mămăligă published by L'Association.

Bonlieu/Forum.title: The Cat in the Hat
Bonlieu/Forum.catchline: The team behind The Cat in the Hat are looking forward to meeting you at a signing session, which will be held at the centre of the Forum Bonlieu.

Bonlieu/Forum.title: Daffy Season
Bonlieu/Forum.catchline: Meet the creative team behind the exclusive short film Daffy Season, screened as a Special Event.

Bonlieu/Forum.title: Bad Fairies
Bonlieu/Forum.catchline: Meet the team behind Bad Fairies, whose first look will be revealed during the Special Event: Warner Bros. Pictures Animation – A New Chapter!

Bonlieu/Forum.title: Moko-chan – "THE GHOST IN THE SHELL"
Bonlieu/Forum.catchline: Come and meet Moko-chan, Director of the brand-new animation TV series The Ghost in the Shell.

Bonlieu/Forum.title: Randall Finnerty
Bonlieu/Forum.catchline: Randall Finnerty, creator of the Annecy 2026 official poster, will be attending a signing session!

Bonlieu/Forum.title: Bobby Chiu
Bonlieu/Forum.catchline: Bobby Chiu will be signing an exclusive poster published by the BDfugue bookshop.

Bonlieu/Forum.title: Kei Acedera
Bonlieu/Forum.catchline: Kei Acedera will be signing an exclusive poster published by the bookshop BDfugue.

Bonlieu/Forum.title: Jean-Marc Rochette – "Le Loup"
Bonlieu/Forum.catchline: Jean-Marc Rochette will be signing copies of his book Le Loup published by Casterman.

Bonlieu/Forum.title: Emilie Phuong & Rupert Wyatt – "The Sunrise File"
Bonlieu/Forum.catchline: Following the selection of their film The Sunrise File for the official competition, Co-Directors Emilie Phuong and Rupert Wyatt are excited to be holding a signing session.

Bonlieu/Forum.title: Félix Delep and Xavier Dorison – "Le Château des animaux"
Bonlieu/Forum.catchline: Félix Delep and Xavier Dorison will be signing their four-volume series, Le Château des animaux, published by Casterman

Bonlieu/Grande salle.title: Lights, Camera, Aardman!
Bonlieu/Grande salle.catchline: Join Peter Lord, Nick Park, David Sproxton and special guests for a special opening session celebrating Aardman's unique approach to storytelling, comedy and craft.

Bonlieu/Grande salle.title: Opening Ceremony
Bonlieu/Grande salle.catchline: Join us for the 2026 Annecy Festival Opening Ceremony and enjoy a preview screening of Minions & Monsters.

Bonlieu/Grande salle.title: Dive into "THE GHOST IN THE SHELL"
Bonlieu/Grande salle.catchline: Go behind the curtain of "THE GHOST IN THE SHELL" an all-new TV anime series. Discover the craft and passion involved in creating a new legendary cyberpunk saga.

Bonlieu/Grande salle.title: Warner Bros. Pictures Animation – A New Chapter
Bonlieu/Grande salle.catchline: Join Bill Damaschke, President and Chief Creative Officer of Warner Bros. Pictures Animation, for an exclusive look at the studio's theatrical slate and creative vision for the future.

Bonlieu/Grande salle.title: Rogue Trooper
Bonlieu/Grande salle.catchline: Attend the premiere of the sci-fi, action and comedy animation feature film Rogue Trooper.

Bonlieu/Grande salle.title: Discovering Nakalimutan, the Forgotten Island
Bonlieu/Grande salle.catchline: Join writers and directors Joel Crawford and Januel P. Mercado for an in-depth preview of the artistry and technology behind the making of DreamWorks Animation's Forgotten Island.

Bonlieu/Grande salle.title: Batman: Knightfall "Part 1: Knightfall"
Bonlieu/Grande salle.catchline: From Warner Bros. Animation, DC Studios, and Warner Home Entertainment comes Batman: Knightfall, a multi-part animated event bringing to life one of the most iconic and beloved runs in the rich history of Batman comics.

Bonlieu/Grande salle.title: "King of the Hill – Season 15" Exclusive Screening
Bonlieu/Grande salle.catchline: First look at a never-before-seen episode of King of the Hill ahead of the season 15 Disney+ premiere, followed by a Q&A with Mike Judge, Greg Daniels and Saladin K. Patterson.

Bonlieu/Grande salle.title: Next on Netflix Animation: from "Ghostbusters" to Brad Bird’s "Ray Gunn"
Bonlieu/Grande salle.catchline: Executive Producers Jason Reitman and Gil Kenan will join Showrunners and Executive Producers Ben Hibon and Elliott Kalan to unveil a world-exclusive behind-the-scenes look at their Ghostbusters creation before its release next year, in collaboration with Sony Pictures Animation.

Bonlieu/Grande salle.title: A Masterclass with Ricky Gervais, Writer and Director of Netflix's "Alley Cats"
Bonlieu/Grande salle.catchline: Join multi-award-winning comedian, and creator of The Office and After Life, Ricky Gervais for a discussion on his upcoming outrageously funny adult animated comedy about a bunch of feral cats.

Bonlieu/Grande salle.title: World’s Finest Animation: DC Studios & Warner Bros Animation
Bonlieu/Grande salle.catchline: DC Studios and Warner Bros. Animation unmask their super-powered slate, delivering first looks and creative insights into the next era of DC animation.

Bonlieu/Grande salle.title: Walt Disney Animation Showcase
Bonlieu/Grande salle.catchline: Discover an all-new world of magic and go behind the scenes of Disney’s Hexed, an original coming-of-age saga releasing exclusively in theaters this November.

Bonlieu/Grande salle.title: Pixar Animation Studios
Bonlieu/Grande salle.catchline: Go behind the scenes of Pixar's upcoming feature film Gatto, with Academy Award®-nominated Director Enrico Casarosa, as he whisk(er)s audiences away into a world of Venetian canals, feline mob bosses and trepidatious superstition.

Bonlieu/Grande salle.title: Children of Liberty
Bonlieu/Grande salle.catchline: Join us for the preview screening of Children of Liberty.

Bonlieu/Grande salle.title: Cérémonie de clôture
Bonlieu/Grande salle.catchline: It's the final curtain for the 2026 Annecy Festival, join us at the Closing Ceremony to find out all the award winners at this year's edition, which was packed full of surprises.

Bonlieu/Petite salle.title: Brothers Quay Retrospective 1: From Interrupted Sleep
Bonlieu/Petite salle.catchline: The Quay Brothers, recipients of the Annecy 2026 Honorary Cristal, are celebrated here in one of two programmes of their short works.

Bonlieu/Petite salle.title: Dreaming of Asia: Stéphanie Lansaque and François Leroy's Films
Bonlieu/Petite salle.catchline: For two decades, Stéphanie Lansaque and François Leroy have been creating a body of work that takes its inspiration from Asian reality, imagination and folklore.

Bonlieu/Petite salle.title: My Two Cars
Bonlieu/Petite salle.catchline: A first look at Adult Swim's new animated comedy from Dan Licata and Joe Pera that follows a man forced to grapple with an absurdly epic daily dilemma.

Bonlieu/Petite salle.title: Brothers Quay Retrospective 2: These Antique Desires
Bonlieu/Petite salle.catchline: The Quay Brothers, recipients of the Annecy 2026 Honorary Cristal, are celebrated here in one of two programmes of their short works.

Bonlieu/Petite salle.title: The Art of Adaptation: "SuperMutant Magic Academy”
Bonlieu/Petite salle.catchline: Join members of the creative team for an exclusive exploration of the creative and production process behind bringing this award-winning graphic novel to life.

Bonlieu/Petite salle.title: The Making of "Rogue Trooper"
Bonlieu/Petite salle.catchline: Join Writer/Director Duncan Jones and the filmmaking team for a behind-the-scenes look at the forthcoming animated sci-fi action comedy feature Rogue Trooper.

Bonlieu/Petite salle.title: In Conversation with the Brothers Quay
Bonlieu/Petite salle.catchline: This year's recipients of the Honorary Cristal, Stephen and Timothy Quay have inspired generations of filmmakers with films such as Street of Crocodiles (1986), In Absentia (2000) and Maska (2010).

Bonlieu/Petite salle.title: Between Sci-Fi and Horror, Animation of All Genres
Bonlieu/Petite salle.catchline: Jérémie Périn and Jérémie Hoarau, who previously reunited by the acclaimed Lastman, come together to discuss genre cinema.

Bonlieu/Petite salle.title: "President Curtis": World Premiere
Bonlieu/Petite salle.catchline: Attend the world premiere of President Curtis, Adult Swim's new series starring Keith David and co-created by Rick and Morty EPs Dan Harmon and James Siciliano.

Bonlieu/Petite salle.title: ViQueens
Bonlieu/Petite salle.catchline: This is the first animated feature from Director Harald Zwart (The Karate Kid, The Mortal Instruments, Agent Cody Banks, The Pink Panther 2) and Producer Veslemøy Ruud Zwart (The 12th Man, Troll), created under their banner Zwart Arbeid.

Bonlieu/Petite salle.title: Masterclass: Stéphanie Lansaque and François Leroy
Bonlieu/Petite salle.catchline: Stéphanie Lansaque and François Leroy talk about their work, Asian inspirations (where they live some of the year), their relationship with genre cinema and the endless possibilities that animation offers.

Bonlieu/Petite salle.title: "Living the Dream" & "Keeping Up with the Joneses"
Bonlieu/Petite salle.catchline: Warner Bros. Animation and Hanna-Barbera Studios Europe preview two original half-hour comedies, offering a first look at the creative and comedic vision behind each series.

Bonlieu/Petite salle.title: Spotlight on "Fleur", Rémi Chayé's upcoming film
Bonlieu/Petite salle.catchline: Through its set design, animation and music composition, Rémi Chayé will present Fleur, his upcoming feature film starring Eddine Noël, Juliette Laurent and Florencia Di Concilio.

Bonlieu/Petite salle.title: Queers and Superheroes
Bonlieu/Petite salle.catchline: Directors ofJim Queen (Marco Nguyen and Nicolas Athane) and Zsazsa Zaturnah (Avid Liongoren) discuss the challenges and rewards of creating queer superheroes.
